backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend canister with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: Permissions-Policy HTTP headers for Web Serial API, enhanced error handling with user-friendly messages, and secure context (HTTPS) validation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated summaries of frontend source files describing React components, hooks, and utilities for a laser engraver control application with Web Serial API integration.
frontend/.ic-assets.json5: IC assets configuration file that sets Permissions-Policy HTTP header to explicitly allow the 'serial' feature for all frontend assets.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a comprehensive design system including light/dark theme colors, spacing, borders, and component-specific styling tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Laser Engraver Studio application with a root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component with tabbed interface for image/G-code upload, parameter controls, manual positioning, job progress monitoring, and command history organized in a responsive three-column grid layout.
frontend/src/components/CommandHistoryPa: Command history console component displaying timestamped commands, responses, and errors with color-coded formatting and a clear history button.
Connection status display and control component with connect/disconnect buttons, status badges, and context-aware error alerts that provide specific guidance for HTTPS requirements and browser compatibility issues.
frontend/src/components/GCodeFileUploadP: G-code file upload component supporting .gcode, .nc, and .txt files with file preview in scrollable area, metadata display (line count, file size), and clear functionality.
frontend/src/components/GCodePreviewPane: Displays generated G-code in a scrollable preview with metadata badges showing line count and estimated execution time.
frontend/src/components/ImageUploadPanel: Handles image file upload (JPG/PNG) with preview, displays image metadata (dimensions, file size), and notifies parent component of loaded image data.
frontend/src/components/JobProgressPanel: Monitors and controls G-code job execution with progress bar, time estimates, and start/pause/resume/stop controls for connected devices.
frontend/src/components/JogControlsPanel: Provides manual X/Y axis movement controls with configurable jog distances (0.1-50mm) using directional buttons and G-code commands.
frontend/src/components/ParameterControl: Configures G-code generation parameters including method (line-scan/vector-trace), laser power, speed, and resolution, then triggers generation and passes result to parent.
frontend/src/components/PositioningContr: Provides homing, work origin setting, and auto-centering controls for laser engraver positioning via G-code commands.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages backend actor instances with Internet Identity authentication, automatically invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommandHistory.ts: Zustand store managing command history entries with timestamps, categorizing them as commands, responses, or errors with add and clear operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useGCodeFileUpload.ts: React hook for uploading and parsing G-code files (.gcode, .nc, .txt), extracting metadata like line count and file size, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useGCodeGeneration.ts: React hook for generating G-code from ImageData using either line-scan or vector-trace methods, with configurable laser power, speed, and resolution parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useGCodeSender.ts: React hook that sends G-code commands line-by-line via Web Serial, supporting pause/resume/stop controls and progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageUpload.ts: React hook for uploading JPG/PNG images, extracting ImageData from canvas, and providing image metadata (dimensions, file size) with preview URL.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login/logout state and identity delegation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useJobProgress.ts: Zustand store for tracking laser engraving job progress (status, current line, elapsed time, estimated time remaining) with start/pause/resume/stop controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebSerial.ts: React hook for Web Serial API communication with laser engravers, handling connection/disconnection, command sending, and response reading with error handling for HTTPS and browser compatibility.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors (background, foreground, primary, destructive, etc.) using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/types/web-serial.d.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the Web Serial API, including SerialPort, SerialOptions, and Navigator.serial interfaces.
frontend/src/utils/gcodeGenerators/lineS: Generates G-code for line-by-line laser engraving by scanning image pixels row by row, converting grayscale intensity to laser power values, and outputting movement commands with laser on/off control based on a power threshold.
frontend/src/utils/gcodeGenerators/vecto: Generates G-code for vector-based laser engraving by detecting edges in a thresholded binary image, grouping nearby edge points into contours, and tracing each contour with the laser on to create outline-based engraving paths.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended typography and animation utilities, custom font families (Inter, JetBrains Mono), glow shadow effects, and accordion animations for the UI.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing a frontend-only laser engraving control application using Web Serial API to connect to Wizmaker Wand Mini 2.5W engraver, with features for image-to-G-code conversion, manual controls, and progress tracking; notes known issues with permissions policy and HTTPS requirements.
